_comment: Example Wakil config — copy to ~/.config/wakil/config.json. The endpoints block names each server Wakil can talk to; default_endpoint selects the active one. kind 'openai' is any plain OpenAI-compatible server (llama.cpp server, OpenRouter, vLLM); kind 'ilm-proxy' is the ilm proxy with memory/grounding. For kind 'openai', model is REQUIRED and is the literal string sent in requests. temperature/top_p/max_tokens are optional — when omitted the server's own defaults apply. Legacy configs without an endpoints block keep working unchanged (top-level base_url + model, treated as ilm-proxy).
